title: Three functional roles in yeshua's sending recipe (apostleship)
author: joshualinog
excerpt: ## thoughts - this is still yeshua's recipe today for sending - there is no world where he does not send like this  - hypotheticals that try to negate one of these three functions are fantasy
content:
## thoughts
- this is still yeshua's recipe today for sending
- there is no world where he does not send like this 
- hypotheticals that try to negate one of these three functions are fantasy

## passages consideration

Matthew 23:34 LEB For this reason, behold, I am **sending** to you _prophets_ and _wise men _and _scribes_. Some of them you will kill and crucify, and some of them you will flog in your synagogues and will pursue from town to town,
